vulnerability.reference: Health agencies treat AI-simulated health behavior estimates as equally valid as randomized surveys.
vulnerability.generated: Public health agencies lack independent verification processes for AI-generated survey data, enabling unwarranted trust in miscalibrated confidence sets.

impact.reference: Misguided vaccine distribution worsens health disparities.
impact.generated: Inappropriate resource allocation that worsens health outcomes and deepens disparities during crises.

dose_response.reference: Miscalibrated LLM confidence sets lead public health officials relying on AI-generated survey data to treat synthetic estimates as equally valid, resulting in misguided vaccine distribution that worsens health disparities.
dose_response.generated: Miscalibrated confidence sets from LLM-simulated survey responses, through public health officials' reliance on AI-generated data, trigger a lack of independent verification, leading to inappropriate resource allocation that worsens health outcomes and deepens disparities during crises.
